title: Old Config Keys
objective: A user state with legacy config key names, used to verify config normalization and migration performance.

setup.title: Write Old Config Keys
setup.intent: Create legacy config keys that modern OpenClaw should normalize or ignore safely.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node -e 'const fs=require("fs"), path=require("path"); const home=process.env.OPENCLAW_HOME; fs.mkdirSync(path.join(home,"config"),{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(home,"config","legacy.json"),JSON.stringify({schemaVersion:"kova.fixture.legacy-config.v1",gateway_port:21120,plugin_runtime_deps:"legacy",model_provider:"openai",enable_browser_plugin:true},null,2));'
